overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban environment. The player character walks through a narrow alley with glowing advertisements and vending machines, then exits onto a main street with futuristic traffic and towering buildings covered in digital billboards.

agents.ego_description: walking into a covered alleyway beneath an overpass, passing vending machines and stacked cargo containers

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure overhead with metal beams
illuminated advertisement screen showing promotional content
futuristic automated vending machine with glowing interface
metal cargo crates and boxes stacked on the sidewalk
building windows illuminated with colored neon lights
large structural support columns for the overpass

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a concrete overpass at night, with the camera moving forward into a narrow covered walkway. Neon-lit windows glow on the left while stacked cargo containers line the right side. A large digital billboard is visible overhead as the player enters the alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit service alley with vending machines

events.description: approaching a group of NPCs gathered near a bright purple neon sign

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alley illuminated by vibrant neon signs, approaching a group of people near a bar entrance

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing and conversing near outdoor seating tables

entered.detail: large hanging neon sign with purple and pink illumination
vertical neon sign with blue and cyan lighting
temporary metal fencing and barricades along the wall
tables and chairs arranged outside a bar or restaurant
large industrial waste containers and dumpsters

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the narrow alley, the environment is dominated by a bright purple neon 'XXX' sign hanging overhead. The player passes vending machines and metal barriers on the left, with stacked containers on the right. A group of NPCs stands near outdoor seating, and steam rises from vents in the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from alley to main city street with traffic

events.description: exits the narrow alley and emerges onto a main street with vehicle traffic and tall buildings
turns right onto the sidewalk and begins walking alongside moving traffic

agents.ego_description: exiting the alley and turning right onto the main street sidewalk, beginning to walk alongside the road with futuristic vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving past on the main road

entered.detail: multi-lane city street with wet asphalt reflecting lights
high-rise skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents
modern street lamps casting bright illumination
building exterior with large glowing panels and digital displays
massive advertising screens on building sides
elevated highway or monorail track running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: The player exits the narrow alley into a wide urban street, turning right to walk along the sidewalk. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet road, while towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards rise in the background. An elevated transit structure runs overhead on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street with digital billboards and storefronts

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the main street sidewalk, passing neon-lit buildings and observing the city traffic and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: building-sized digital display showing advertisements
commercial shop entrance with illuminated signage
doorway to building with glowing trim

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the main street, the player passes by storefronts and large digital screens mounted on buildings. The overhead transit structure remains visible on the right, while traffic flows along the wet road. Another pedestrian passes by walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: waiting at the intersection as multiple vehicles pass through the crossing
camera tilts upward to look at the underside of the massive overpass structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting for traffic to pass, and looking up at the massive concrete overpass structure overhead

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car turning at the intersection
white sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: wide road intersection with traffic markings and crosswalks
massive concrete support columns for the elevated highway
illuminated traffic signals controlling the intersection

segments.scene_description: The player reaches a large intersection dominated by massive highway overpass pillars. Several vehicles including a yellow sports car navigate the crossing. The camera continues forward, then tilts upward to reveal the underside of the elevated highway structure overhead, showcasing the massive concrete and steel construction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into a sprawling, futuristic urban intersection. It begins under a concrete overpass, moving through a narrow covered walkway flanked by glowing windows and stacked cargo containers. As the camera pushes deeper into the alley, the environment becomes saturated with purple neon light and rising steam before the space suddenly opens up into a wide city street. The scene then shifts to a sidewalk walk past towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards, with futuristic vehicles gliding across a wet road beneath an elevated transit structure. Finally, the camera reaches a large intersection dominated by highway pillars and a yellow sports car, tilting upward to reveal the massive concrete and steel underside of the overhead highway.
